Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: Now that we've covered aircraft carrier operation, aircraft types, and aircraft loadouts, feel free to use this mission to continue practicing carrier ops.

Iceland is south of our carrier group and there are several enemy targets ashore that can be attacked by our forces. Use the knowledge you have gained to launch and recover strikes to destroy the shore installations.
